hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】伊朗战争导致能源成本飙升，美国通胀率跃升至3.8%；【CRYPTO】参议院在预期的主席投票之前确认凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 加入美联储董事会；【FINANCE】交易员认为今年通胀率可能接近 5%。

items.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
items.summary: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争导致能源成本飙升，美国通胀率跃升至3.8%
items.summary_zh: 随着消费者感受到伊朗战争的影响，衡量美国通胀的关键指标升至 2023 年 5 月以来的最高水平。

items.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to Fed board ahead of expected Chair vote
items.summary: Warsh’s confirmation to the Fed board positions the crypto-linked investor to replace Jerome Powell as chair amid inflation and digital asset policy debates.
items.title_zh: 参议院在预期的主席投票之前确认凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 加入美联储董事会
items.summary_zh: 沃什向美联储董事会的确认使这位与加密货币相关的投资者在通胀和数字资产政策辩论中取代杰罗姆·鲍威尔担任美联储主席。

items.title: Traders believe inflation could near 5% this year
items.summary: Prediction market traders see two-in-three odds that inflation will go above 4.5% this year, and nearly 40% odds that prices will accelerate above 5%.
items.title_zh: 交易员认为今年通胀率可能接近 5%
items.summary_zh: 预测市场交易者认为今年通胀率将超过 4.5% 的可能性为三分之二，而物价将加速超过 5% 的可能性接近 40%。

items.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
items.summary: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在
items.summary_zh: Anthropic Mythos 的到来让银行、软件巨头和政府开始思考网络攻击的新时代。但威胁已经来临。

items.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗停火是“巨大的生命支持”
items.summary_zh: 美国总统批评伊朗提出的结束战争的还价，并表示为期一个月的停火“软弱得令人难以置信”。

items.title: Benchmark joins others in reiterating Buy rating on Coinbase stock despite lackluster Q1 earnings
items.summary: Benchmark equities analysts have reiterated their Buy rating for Coinbase's stock, raising their price target for COIN to $270 from $260.
items.title_zh: 尽管第一季度收益低迷，Benchmark 仍与其他公司一起重申对 Coinbase 股票的买入评级
items.summary_zh: Benchmark 股票分析师重申了对 Coinbase 股票的买入评级，将 COIN 的目标价从 260 美元上调至 270 美元。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Iran Must Make Deal or Face Renewed Attacks
items.summary: Iran stuck to its most recent demands after President Trump dismissed them as unacceptable. As Mr. Trump left for a summit in China, he told reporters the war was “very much under control.”
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普称伊朗必须达成协议，否则将面临新一轮袭击
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普总统认为这些要求不可接受后，伊朗坚持了最新的要求。特朗普前往中国参加峰会时告诉记者，战争“已基本得到控制”。

items.title: JPMorgan files to launch new tokenized fund as Wall Street tokenization race heats up
items.summary: The global banking giant is expanding its tokenized money market lineup, following BlackRock's similar move just a few days ago.
items.title_zh: 随着华尔街代币化竞赛的升温，摩根大通申请推出新的代币化基金
items.summary_zh: 继几天前贝莱德采取类似举措后，这家全球银行巨头正在扩大其代币化货币市场阵容。

items.title: The Ethereum Foundation unveils new 'Clear Signing' standard to stop users from approving malicious crypto transactions
items.summary: The move comes after billions in losses from phishing attacks and wallet drains, with Ethereum pushing to make transaction approvals safer and easier to understand.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会推出新的“清晰签名”标准，以阻止用户批准恶意加密交易
items.summary_zh: 在此之前，网络钓鱼攻击和钱包流失造成了数十亿美元的损失，以太坊正在努力使交易审批更安全、更容易理解。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin climbs back to $80,800 as U.S. stocks bounce into the close
items.summary: Inflation rose to a three-year high in April, according to this morning's Consumer Price Index report.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：随着美国股市反弹收盘，比特币攀升至 80,800 美元
items.summary_zh: 根据今天上午的消费者价格指数报告，四月份通货膨胀率升至三年高位。

items.title: First-ever Hyperliquid ETF launches, posts ‘very solid’ first day of trading: analyst
items.summary: Investors buying shares in the instrument gain exposure to the HYPE token without having to own the cryptocurrency.
items.title_zh: 首只超流动性 ETF 推出，首日交易表现“非常强劲”：分析师
items.summary_zh: 购买该工具股票的投资者无需拥有加密货币即可获得 HYPE 代币的投资。

items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 使用 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展网络的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展了网络可信访问，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
items.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.
items.title_zh: 由于损失不断增加，摩根大通领导的银行集团限制了陷入困境的 KKR 私人信贷基金的信贷额度
items.summary_zh: KKR 基金（通常以其股票代码 FSK 提及）已成为私人信贷故事中最明显的断层线之一。

items.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.summary: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
items.summary: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.
items.title_zh: 联合国卫生机构称，没有迹象表明存在更大规模的汉坦病毒爆发
items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。

items.title: Lebanon says two paramedics among 13 killed in Israeli strikes
items.summary: Lebanon's health ministry says the paramedics were carrying out a rescue mission in Nabatieh in response to an earlier attack that killed one person.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩称以色列空袭造成 13 人死亡，其中两名护理人员
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩卫生部表示，医护人员正在纳巴提耶执行救援任务，以应对早些时候造成一人死亡的袭击事件。

items.title: Xi Is Poised to Press Trump on Arms Sales to Taiwan During China Summit
items.summary: Beijing has called Taiwan the “core of China’s core interests.” Xi Jinping is likely to focus on getting President Trump to slow approval of more weapons for the self-governing island.
items.title_zh: 习近平准备在中国峰会期间就向台湾出售武器问题向特朗普施压
items.summary_zh: 北京称台湾是“中国核心利益的核心”。习近平可能会集中精力让特朗普总统放慢批准为这个自治岛屿提供更多武器的速度。

items.title: Russia Keeps Attacking U.S. Firms in Ukraine. The White House Is Silent.
items.summary: Facilities tied to Coca-Cola, Cargill, Mondelez and others appear to have been deliberately hit. The Trump administration’s muted response has raised concerns.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯不断攻击在乌克兰的美国公司。白宫一片寂静。
items.summary_zh: 与可口可乐、嘉吉、亿滋等公司相关的设施似乎遭到了故意袭击。特朗普政府的低调回应引发了担忧。

items.title: Putin’s Credibility Has Suffered in the Iran War. Or Has It?
items.summary: Despite its long slog in Ukraine and the loss of former allies like Syria, Russia is benefiting from costly energy, a clever narrative and America’s own failure to achieve a quick victory.
items.title_zh: 普京的信誉在伊朗战争中受到损害。或者有吗？
items.summary_zh: 尽管在乌克兰问题上长期举步维艰，并失去了叙利亚等前盟友，但俄罗斯仍受益于昂贵的能源、巧妙的叙述以及美国自身未能取得快速胜利的失败。

items.title: Video Shows Philippine Senator Outrunning Agents and Avoiding I.C.C. Warrant
items.summary: Video shows Senator Ronald dela Rosa, who is wanted by the International Criminal Court over Rodrigo Duterte’s drug war, dashing into the Philippine Senate.
items.title_zh: 视频显示菲律宾参议员超越特工并避开国际刑事法院保证
items.summary_zh: 视频显示，因罗德里戈·杜特尔特反毒战争而被国际刑事法院通缉的参议员罗纳德·德拉·罗莎冲进菲律宾参议院。

items.title: The Iran War Is Taking the Color Out of Japan’s Best-Known Snack Bags
items.summary: The food giant Calbee said shortages of naphtha, a crude-oil derivative used in inks, were forcing it to switch to black-and-white packaging for its salty products.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争正在让日本最著名的零食袋黯然失色
items.summary_zh: 食品巨头卡乐比表示，石脑油（一种用于墨水的原油衍生物）的短缺迫使其咸味产品改用黑白包装。

items.title: Nigerian Military Accused of War Crimes After Deadly Market Airstrikes
items.summary: A military spokesman confirmed the bombing in Zamfara state, but said there was no verifiable evidence of civilian casualties.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚军方在致命的市场空袭后被指控犯有战争罪
items.summary_zh: 军方发言人证实了扎姆法拉州发生的爆炸事件，但表示没有可核实的平民伤亡证据。

items.title: Privacy emerges as crypto’s next 'killer app,' with Arc, Canton and Tempo topping $1 billion in funding
items.summary: New fundraising rounds for three institution-focused blockchains show how regulation, privacy and corporate competition are reshaping crypto infrastructure, according to Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan.
items.title_zh: Arc、Canton 和 Tempo 融资额超过 10 亿美元，隐私成为加密货币的下一个“杀手级应用”
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 首席信息官 Matt Hougan 表示，三个以机构为中心的区块链的新一轮融资表明，监管、隐私和企业竞争正在重塑加密货币基础设施。

items.title: Spot XRP ETFs attract biggest inflows since January
items.summary: The five U.S.-listed spot XRP funds pulled in $25.8 million on Monday, the largest single-day net inflow since Jan. 5, even as ether spot ETFs shed nearly $17 million.
items.title_zh: 现货 XRP ETF 吸引自 1 月份以来最大的资金流入
items.summary_zh: 周一，在美国上市的五只现货 XRP 基金吸纳了 2580 万美元的资金，这是自 1 月 5 日以来最大的单日净流入，尽管以太坊现货 ETF 却蒸发了近 1700 万美元。

items.title: JPMorgan launching second tokenized money market fund on Ethereum
items.summary: The new fund will invest in U.S. Treasurys and overnight repurchase agreements collateralized by Treasurys or cash.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在以太坊上推出第二支代币化货币市场基金
items.summary_zh: 新基金将投资于美国国债以及以国债或现金抵押的隔夜回购协议。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Firo (FIRO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #815.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Firo (FIRO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#815。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #206.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：ZANO (ZANO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 206 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Saga (SAGA)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #943.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Saga (SAGA)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#943。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Sun Token (SUN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #134.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Sun Token (SUN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 134 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Billions Network (BILL)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #115.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Billions Network (BILL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 115 位。

items.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
items.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.
items.title_zh: 参数高尔夫教会了我们关于人工智能辅助研究的哪些知识
items.summary_zh: Parameter Golf 汇聚了 1,000 多名参与者和 2,000 多份提交材料，在严格约束下探索人工智能辅助机器学习研究、编码代理、量化和新颖模型设计。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
items.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率如何在 2026 年初扩大
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率在 2026 年第一季度激增，其中 35 岁以上的用户增长最快，性别使用更加平衡，这表明主流 AI 的采用更加广泛。

items.title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
items.summary: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption.
items.title_zh: 在 OpenAI 上安全运行 Codex
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何通过沙箱、审批、网络策略和代理本机遥测技术安全地运行 Codex，以支持安全且合规的编码代理采用。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: Bitcoin’s bull-bear cycle indicator turns green for first time since March 2023
items.summary: While some experts point to $90,000 as the next explosive level, others caution that this new "early bull" signal isn't a guaranteed crystal ball.
items.title_zh: 比特币牛熊周期指标自 2023 年 3 月以来首次变绿
items.summary_zh: 虽然一些专家指出 90,000 美元是下一个爆炸性水平，但其他人警告说，这个新的“早期牛市”信号并不是一个有保证的水晶球。

items.title: Bitcoin dominance rebounds above 58% signaling crypto market consolidation phase
items.summary: Dominance peaked near 62%–63% last year before a sustained drawdown through late 2025, bottoming near 54%–55%.
items.title_zh: 比特币主导地位反弹至 58% 以上，标志着加密货币市场整合阶段
items.summary_zh: 去年，主导地位达到峰值，接近 62%–63%，随后持续下降，直至 2025 年末，触底接近 54%–55%。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation rolls out support for Clear Signing crypto security solution
items.summary: Clear Signing is a crypto security feature that aims to simplify transaction descriptions so humans can understand what they're approving.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会推出对 Clear Signing 加密安全解决方案的支持
items.summary_zh: 清晰签名是一项加密安全功能，旨在简化交易描述，以便人们能够理解他们正在批准的内容。

items.title: Bitcoin Fog appeal tests DOJ theory that global crypto services fall under US law
items.summary: The panel also scrutinized the reliability of the "IP overlap" analysis used to link Sterlingov to Bitcoin Fog.
items.title_zh: 比特币雾上诉测试了司法部关于全球加密服务受美国法律管辖的理论
items.summary_zh: 该小组还仔细审查了用于将斯特林戈夫与比特币雾联系起来的“IP 重叠”分析的可靠性。
